name: @astrake/lumora-server
description: Slim Bun + Hono framework — typed config, file-based resources, auto-generated REST/SSE/WebSocket endpoints, JWT auth, SQLite, and an interactive init wizard.
author: Anuvab Chakraborty (https://github.com/madlybong)

scripts.prepack: bun -e "await Bun.write('README.md', await Bun.file('../../README.md').text()); await Bun.write('CHANGELOG.md', await Bun.file('../../CHANGELOG.md').text())"
scripts.postpack: bun -e "import { unlinkSync } from 'fs'; try { unlinkSync('README.md') } catch(e){} try { unlinkSync('CHANGELOG.md') } catch(e){}"
scripts.build: bun -e "import { rmSync } from 'fs'; try { rmSync('dist', { recursive: true }) } catch(e) {} " && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && bun build ./src/index.ts ./bin/init.ts --outdir ./dist --target bun
